synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-16099 Important: Oracle Linux 7 postgresql security update
description:
[9.2.24-9.0.7]
- Restrict psql meta-commands in plain-text dumps [Orabug: 38442031][CVE-2025-8714]

[9.2.24-9.0.5]
- Resolves CVE-2025-1094: Improper neutralization of quoting syntax in certain
- libpq functions [Orabug: 37843176]
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-16099

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-16099.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 7 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
postgresql-9.2.24-9.0.7.el7_9.i686.rpm
postgresql-9.2.24-9.0.7.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
postgresql-contrib-9.2.24-9.0.7.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
postgresql-devel-9.2.24-9.0.7.el7_9.i686.rpm
postgresql-devel-9.2.24-9.0.7.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
postgresql-docs-9.2.24-9.0.7.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
postgresql-libs-9.2.24-9.0.7.el7_9.i686.rpm
postgresql-libs-9.2.24-9.0.7.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
postgresql-plperl-9.2.24-9.0.7.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
postgresql-plpython-9.2.24-9.0.7.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
postgresql-pltcl-9.2.24-9.0.7.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
postgresql-server-9.2.24-9.0.7.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
postgresql-static-9.2.24-9.0.7.el7_9.i686.rpm
postgresql-static-9.2.24-9.0.7.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
postgresql-test-9.2.24-9.0.7.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
postgresql-upgrade-9.2.24-9.0.7.el7_9.x86_64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol7/SRPMS-updates/postgresql-9.2.24-9.0.7.el7_9.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-8714




Description of changes:

[9.2.24-9.0.7]
- Restrict psql meta-commands in plain-text dumps [Orabug: 38442031][CVE-2025-8714]

[9.2.24-9.0.5]
- Resolves CVE-2025-1094: Improper neutralization of quoting syntax in certain
- libpq functions [Orabug: 37843176]
